text: I feel a sense of anticipation, as if I am suspended in a liminal space between the sterile quiet of the entrance and the vibrant curiosity of the exhibit. The minimalist emptiness of the first room heightens my alertness to every detail, while the second room—splashed with color and words—invites my mind to awaken and explore. I am acutely aware of the transition from isolation to intellectual stimulation, and I sense that ideas are waiting to be discovered if I choose to engage.
